---
title: "Pade Approximation"
bibliography: ../../references.bib
---

Source inspiration: [Numerical Methods Modules](https://web.archive.org/web/20190808102217/http://mathfaculty.fullerton.edu/mathews/n2003/NumericalUndergradMod.html).

## Animation Focus

This page will prioritize intuitive animations that show the algorithm behavior step by step.

### Planned animation ideas

- Visual state evolution of the method
- Parameter sensitivity controls
- Convergence and failure side-by-side comparison

## Derivation Notes (Planned)

Short derivations will be added to explain the core equations and assumptions.

## Worked Example (Planned)

A compact numerical example with intermediate steps will be included.

## Implementation Notes (Planned)

Implementation details, numerical stability notes, and practical pitfalls will be added.

## Legacy Animation Inventory (Stub)

- Legacy module page: [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/n2003/PadeApproximationMod.html) (ok)
- Animation links found in module Animations paragraph: 4
- Unique animation portals: 1

### Animation Portals

1. [Padé Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade.html) (ok)

- Animation item links found: 27

### Animation Items

1. [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade01/Padeaa.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade01/Padeaa.gif
2. [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade02/Padebb.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade02/Padebb.gif
3. [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade03/Padecc.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade03/Padecc.gif
4. [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade04/Padedd.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade04/Padedd.gif
5. [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade05/Padeee.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade05/Padeee.gif
6. [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade06/Padeff.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade06/Padeff.gif
7. [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade07/Padegg.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
8. [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade08/Padehh.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade08/Padehh.gif
9. [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade09/Padeii.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
10. [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade10/Padejj.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
11. [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade11/Padekk.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
12. [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade12/Padell.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
13. [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade13/Pademm.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade13/Pademm.gif
14. [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade14/Padenn.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
15. [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade15/Padeoo.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
16. [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade16/Padepp.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
17. [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade17/Padeqq.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
18. [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade18/Paderr.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
19. [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade19/Padess.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
20. [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade20/Padett.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade20/Padett.gif
21. [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade21/Padeuu.html) (ok)
- Main animated GIF count: 1
- http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade21/Padeuu.gif
22. [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade22/Padevv.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
23. [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade23/Padeww.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
24. [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade24/Padexx.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
25. [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade25/Padeyy.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
26. [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade26/Padezz.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
27. [Pade Approximation](http://localhost:8000/a2001/Animations/Interpolation/Pade/Pade27/Padeaaa.html) (error)
- Main animated GIF count: 0
